zh.Of Branscombe, Eng: 英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bampfield於1633年出生在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆時，他的父親William Bamfield29歲，母親Elizabeth Starre31歲。他於1665年10月5日與Joan Clarke在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1719年7月15日享年86歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bampfield于1633年出生在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆时，他的父亲William Bamfield29岁，母亲Elizabeth Starre31岁。他于1665年10月5日与Joan Clarke在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1719年7月15日享年86岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Bampfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Canfield
meanings: habitational name from Great or Little Canfield in Essex, named with the Old English personal name Cana (see Cane 2) + feld ‘open country’.
in some cases the surname may be of Norman origin, a habitational name from Canville-les-Deux-Églises in Seine-Maritime (France).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bampfield was born in 1633, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bamfield, was 29 and his mother, Elizabeth Starre, was 31. He married Joan Clarke on 5 October 1665, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 July 1719, at the age of 86, and was buried in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bampfield est né en 1633, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bamfield, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Starre, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Clarke le 5 octobre 1665, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1719, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bampfield 1633 in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bamfield 29 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Starre 31. Er hat am 5. Oktober 1665 in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom Joan Clarke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juli 1719 im Alter von 86 Jahren und wurde in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bampfield è nato il nel 1633 nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bamfield, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Starre, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joan Clarke il 5 ottobre 1665, nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1719, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bampfieldが1633年にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベで生まれた時，父William Bamfieldは29歳，母Elizabeth Starreは31歳であった。1665年10月5日にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベでJoan Clarkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1719年7月15日に86歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bampfield(이)가 1633년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bamfield(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Starre(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1665년 10월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 Joan Clarke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1719년 7월 15일 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bampfield nasceu em 1633, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bamfield, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Starre, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Clarke em 5 de outubro de 1665, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1719, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bampfield родился в 1633 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bamfield было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Starre, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Clarke 5 октября 1665 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 июля 1719 г. в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bampfield nació en 1633, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bamfield, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Starre, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Joan Clarke el 5 de octubre de 1665, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 15 de julio de 1719, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
